#pragma once

#include <ranges>
#include <rfl.hpp>
#include <rfl/json.hpp>
#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <vector>

namespace query_daily_traffic_metrics {

struct PageVisit {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> visit_id;
  std::string url;
  sqlgen::Timestamp<"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"> visit_time;
};

struct DailyTraffic {
  std::string visit_date;
  int total_visits;
  int unique_pages;
};

struct DailyTrafficView {
  static constexpr const char* tablename = "DailyTrafficView";
  static constexpr bool is_view = true;
  std::string visit_date;
  int total_visits;
  int unique_pages;
};

/**
 * Function: Calculate daily traffic metrics from a log table.
 * 
 * @return List of daily traffic metrics
 */
std::vector<DailyTraffic> query_daily_traffic_metrics() {
  using namespace sqlgen::literals;

  // Connect to the database and get the connection object
  auto conn = sqlgen::sqlite::connect("test_db.sqlite").value();

  // Build the query
  auto query = sqlgen::select_from<PageVisit>(
      sqlgen::date("visit_time"_c).as<"visit_date">,
      sqlgen::count().as<"total_visits">,
      sqlgen::count_distinct("url"_c).as<"unique_pages">
  ) | sqlgen::group_by(sqlgen::date("visit_time"_c))
    | sqlgen::order_by(sqlgen::date("visit_time"_c))
    | sqlgen::to<std::vector<DailyTraffic>>;

  // Execute the query and return the result
  return query(conn);
}

}  // namespace query_daily_traffic_metrics
```

#pragma once

#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <vector>
#include <algorithm>

namespace trim_and_length_validation {

struct UserProfile {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> user_id;
  std::string name;
  std::string email;
};

struct ValidatedProfile {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> user_id;
  std::string trimmed_name;
  std::string trimmed_email;
  int name_length;
  int email_length;
};

// Helper functions for trimming
std::string ltrim(const std::string& str, const std::string& chars = " ") {
    auto it = str.begin();
    while (it != str.end() && std::isspace(*it)) {
        ++it;
    }
    return std::string(it, str.end());
}

std::string rtrim(const std::string& str, const std::string& chars = " ") {
    if (str.empty()) return str;
    auto it = str.rbegin();
    while (it != str.rend() && std::isspace(*it)) {
        ++it;
    }
    return std::string(str.begin(), it);
}

std::string trim(const std::string& str, const std::string& chars = " ") {
    return ltrim(rtrim(str, chars), chars);
}

std::vector<ValidatedProfile> trim_and_length_validation() {
    // Connect to the database
    auto conn_result = sqlgen::sqlite::connect("test_db.sqlite");
    if (!conn_result) {
        throw std::runtime_error("Failed to connect to database");
    }

    // Read all user profiles
    auto profiles_result = sqlgen::read<std::vector<UserProfile>>(conn);
    if (!profiles_result) {
        throw std::runtime_error("Failed to read profiles");
    }
    auto profiles = *profiles_result;

    std::vector<ValidatedProfile> validated_profiles;
    validated_profiles.reserve(profiles.size());

    for (const auto& profile : profiles) {
        ValidatedProfile validated_profile;
        validated_profile.user_id = profile.user_id;

        // Apply trimming to name and email
        validated_profile.trimmed_name = trim(profile.name);

        // Calculate lengths
        validated_profile.name_length = static_cast<int>(validated_profile.trimmed_name.length());
        validated_profile.email_length = static_cast<int>(validated_profile.trimmed_email.length());

        #include <sqlgen.hpp>
        #include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
        #include <vector>

        namespace analyze_department_employees {

        struct Department {
          sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> department_id;
          std::string department_name;
          std::string location;
        };

        struct Employee {
          sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> employee_id;
          int department_id;
          std::string first_name;
          std::string last_name;
          double salary;
        };

        struct JoinResult {
          std::optional<std::string> department_name;
          std::optional<std::string> first_name;
          std::optional<std::string> last_name;
          std::optional<double> salary;
        };

        struct JoinAnalysis {
          std::vector<JoinResult> inner_join_results;
          std::vector<JoinResult> left_join_results;
          std::vector<JoinResult> right_join_results;
          std::vector<JoinResult> full_join_results;
        };

        JoinAnalysis analyze_department_employees_impl(const std::vector<Department>& depts, const std::vector<Employee>& emps) {
          using namespace sqlgen::literals;

          auto conn = sqlgen::sqlite::connect();

          // Create tables with if_not_exists
          (sqlgen::create_table<Department> | sqlgen::if_not_exists)(conn);
          (sqlgen::create_table<Employee> | sqlgen::if_not_exists)(conn);

          // Insert data
          conn.execute(sqlgen::to_sql(sqlgen::insert(depts)));
          conn.execute(sqlgen::to_sql(sqlgen::insert(emps)));

          // Inner join: Department (d) inner join Employee (e) on d.department_id = e.department_id
          auto inner_query = sqlgen::select_from<Department, "d">(
              sqlgen::Col<"department_name", "d">{},
              sqlgen::Col<"first_name", "e">{},
              sqlgen::Col<"last_name", "e">{},
              sqlgen::Col<"salary", "e">{}
          ) | sqlgen::inner_join<Employee, "e">(sqlgen::Col<"department_id", "d">{} == sqlgen::Col<"department_id", "e">{})
            | sqlgen::to<std::vector<JoinResult>>;

          auto inner_results = inner_query(conn).value();

          // Left join: Employee (e) left join Department (d) on e.department_id = d.department_id
          auto left_query = sqlgen::select_from<Employee, "e">(
              sqlgen::Col<"department_name", "d">{},
              sqlgen::Col<"first_name", "e">{},
              sqlgen::Col<"last_name", "e">{},
              sqlgen::Col<"salary", "e">{}
          ) | sqlgen::left_join<Department, "d">(sqlgen::Col<"department_id", "e">{} == sqlgen::Col<"department_id", "d">{})
            | sqlgen::to<std::vector<JoinResult>>;

          auto left_results = left_query(conn).value();

          // Right join: Department (d) right join Employee (e) on d.department_id = e.department_id
          auto right_query = sqlgen::select_from<Department, "d">(
              sqlgen::Col<"department_name", "d">{},
              sqlgen::Col<"first_name", "e">{},
              sqlgen::Col<"last_name", "e">{},
              sqlgen::Col<"salary", "e">{}
          ) | sqlgen::right_join<Employee, "e">(sqlgen::Col<"department_id", "d">{} == sqlgen::Col<"department_id", "e">{})
            | sqlgen::to<std::vector<JoinResult>>;

          auto right_results = right_query(conn).value();

          // Full join: Employee (e) full join Department (d) on e.department_id = d.department_id
          auto full_query = sqlgen::select_from<Employee, "e">(
              sqlgen::Col<"department_name", "d">{},
              sqlgen::Col<"first_name", "e">{},
              sqlgen::Col<"last_name", "e">{},
              sqlgen::Col<"salary", "e">{}
          ) | sqlgen::full_join<Department, "d">(sqlgen::Col<"department_id", "e">{} == sqlgen::Col<"department_id", "d">{})
            | sqlgen::to<std::vector<JoinResult>>;

          auto full_results = full_query(conn).value();

          return JoinAnalysis{
              .inner_join_results = inner_results,
              .left_join_results = left_results,
              .right_join_results = right_results,
              .full_join_results = full_results
          };
        }

        }  // namespace analyze_department_employees

output.text:
<answer>```cpp
#pragma once

#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <unordered_map>

namespace update_inventory_stock {

struct Product {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> product_id;
  int stock;
};

bool update_inventory_stock(const std::unordered_map<int, int>& received) {
  using namespace sqlgen;
  using namespace sqlgen::literals;
  auto conn_res = sqlite::connect("test_db.sqlite");
  if (!conn_res) return false;
  create_table<Product>(conn_res);

  auto txn_res = begin_transaction(conn_res.value());
  if (!txn_res) return false;
  auto txn = txn_res.value();
  
  // Define column literals
  auto product_id_c = "product_id"_c;
  auto stock_c = "stock"_c;
  
  for (const auto& [pid, qty] : received) {
    // Build type-safe UPDATE statement using sqlgen functions
    auto update_stmt = update<Product>(stock_c.set(stock_c + qty)) 
                     | where(product_id_c == pid);
    
    auto exec_res = update_stmt(txn);
    if (!exec_res) {
      return false;
    }
  }
  
  auto commit_res = commit(txn);
  return commit_res.has_value();
}

}  // namespace update_inventory_stock
```</answer>
